challenge.title: Korak 52
challenge.description: Sada, obrišite rečnik rods i promenite njegove ključeve u parametre A, B, i C, za taj tok, čuvajući njihove vrednosti. Izmenite svoj kod da prikaže ove promene. Ako vidite rezultate u terminalu, uspešno ste izvršili ovaj korak.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
NUMBER_OF_DISKS = 4
rods = {
    'A': list(range(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 0, -1)),
    'B': [],
    'C': []
}

def move(n, source, auxiliary, target):
    if n > 0:
        # move n - 1 disks from source to auxiliary, so they are out of the way
        move(n - 1, source, target, auxiliary)
        
        # move the nth disk from source to target
        rods[target].append(rods[source].pop())
        
        # display our progress
        print(rods, '\n')
        
        # move the n - 1 disks that we left on auxiliary onto target
        move(n - 1,  auxiliary, source, target)
              
# initiate call from source A to target C with auxiliary B
move(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 'A', 'B', 'C')

tests.text: Treba da promeniš rods['A'] u parametar nazvan A, čuvajući njegovu vrednost.
Trebalo bi da promeniš rods['B'] u parametar nazvan B, čuvajući njegovu vrednost.
Trebalo bi da promeniš rods['C'] u parametar nazvan C, čuvajući njegovu vrednost.
Trebalo bi da ispravite poziv print() da štampa A, B, C, i vrednost rods. Sačuvajte ponašanje za novi red u pozivu print().
Trebalo bi ti da imaš target.append(source.pop()) u svom kodu.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
NUMBER_OF_DISKS = 5
A = list(range(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 0, -1))
B = []
C = []

def move(n, source, auxiliary, target):
    if n <= 0:
        return
    # move n - 1 disks from source to auxiliary, so they are out of the way
    move(n - 1, source, target, auxiliary)
        
    # move the nth disk from source to target
    target.append(source.pop())
        
    # display our progress
    print(A, B, C, '\n')
        
    # move the n - 1 disks that we left on auxiliary onto target
    move(n - 1,  auxiliary, source, target)
              
# initiate call from source A to target C with auxiliary B
move(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, A, B, C)
